title: 第2節　閉じたメーターボックスの内側
continuityNotes: Sera's support unit must be only the cat-ear headband visible on her head.
Do not attach any extra machinery to her back, shoulders, waist, or limbs.
prompt: Create one cinematic 16:9 scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第1章　朝の湯気 / 第1話　朝支度と点検札. Shared talk background: 第1章第1話の朝支度背景. Background reference prompt: Cinematic spring Sunday morning environment inside Sato's modest apartment near the entrance and living area. Show a calm mid-rise Tokyo apartment with soft pale light, neatly set clothes, a tote bag, a compact living space, and a glimpse toward the apartment corridor or door area where maintenance notices might appear. Emphasize quiet order, fresh air, and the careful start of a holiday without showing luxury excess. Preserve the same place, architecture, time of day, weather, lighting, and atmosphere unless the scene text explicitly changes them. Use the same talk-level setting as the shared stage, but show it from a hidden security-side, reverse angle, blind spot, rear approach, service path, or protected backside when appropriate. Scene focus: 第2節　閉じたメーターボックスの内側 / セラパート. Summary: 札は雑だった。 紙の厚みも、角の丸め方も、管理会社がいつも使うものと違う。印字された連絡先は本物に一桁だけ似せてある。セラは共用廊下の死角でその札を一瞥しただけで、今日の班が「… Key beats: 札は雑だった。 紙の厚みも、角の丸め方も、管理会社がいつも使うものと違う。印字された連絡先は本物に一桁だけ似せてある。セラは共用廊下の死角でその札を一瞥しただけで、今日の班が「静かに持っていく」つもりで来ていると理解した。 二人組の偽装作業員は、工具箱に見せかけた拘束具一式を持っていた。ひとりがメーターボックスを開け、もうひとりがサービスエレベーター側の導線を確認する。朝の建物がまだ眠っていると思っている者の動きだった。 セラは階段室から一歩だけ出た。猫耳型の支援ユニットが拾った小さな無線のノイズが、耳の奥で薄く弾ける。最初の男が振り返るより先に、彼女は手首を切り返して工具箱を床へ落とし、肘を支点にその体を壁へ預けさせた。音は、蓋の鈍いひとつで済んだ。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-episode: サトー. Keep him consistent with the episode-specific portrait generated from the canonical Sato image. sera: セラ. Keep her consistent with the canonical Sera portrait, including the visible cat-ear support-security unit, without adding installment-specific redesign. The support unit is completed by the cat-ear headband alone, so do not add backpack rigs, back-mounted devices, extra mechanical arms, exoskeleton parts, visible cable bundles, or any other extra machinery. Do not give her knives, daggers, swords, blades, or any other bladed weapon. Compose for a 1920x1080 delivery, keep main subjects near the center, and preserve enough left/right safe margin so the image still reads well in portrait scrolling mode. Continuity notes: Sera's support unit must be only the cat-ear headband visible on her head. Do not attach any extra machinery to her back, shoulders, waist, or limbs. Use the installment-specific Sato portrait for Sato. Use Sera's canonical portrait directly without redesigning her for this installment. Sera never carries knives or other bladed weapons; if she uses a tool, keep it small, discreet, and non-bladed. For Sato-side images, Sato is dominant and any Sera presence must stay clearly separate and unreadable as a casual companion. For Sera-side images, Sera is dominant, the attacker must not resemble Sato, and Sato must remain an unaware background figure looking elsewhere. Preserve the feeling of a refined but ordinary Sunday, and compose for a 1920x1080 delivery with the main subjects near the center and safe margins on both sides so the image also works in portrait scrolling layouts.
responseTexts: This result captures the intense, near-simultaneous narrative beats perfectly. The spatial arrangement of Sera pinning the infiltrator while Sato looks away provides the necessary context in a single frame. The visual details—specifically the crudely made notice and the fake toolkit—are excellent narrative indicators. Continuity of character designs is preserved without issue. I will pass this final delivery to the user.
